name: BRAISED TOFU WITH PINEAPPLE AND MUSHROOMS

ingredients.item: freshly ground black pepper, plus more for garnish
pineapple, cut into thin and quartered slices

method: Heat ¼ cup (60 ml) of the vegetable oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Once hot, add tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides (10 to 15 minutes). Remove and place on a paper towel–lined plate to drain and let cool. Cut tofu into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes, and season with salt and pepper.
In a large skillet, heat remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over low heat. When hot, add shallots and cook and stir until slightly golden (about 30 seconds).
Add pineapple and sugar, and cook on medium-low heat until slightly caramelized (2 to 3 minutes).
Add the vegetarian oyster sauce, soy sauce, sriracha, water, tofu cubes, and mushrooms. Cover and braise for 10 minutes over low heat.
Transfer to a platter, dust with more ground pepper, garnish with chopped scallion, and serve.
